<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\ControllerMetadata; /** * Builds method argument data. * * @author Iltar van der Berg <kjarli@gmail.com> */ interface ArgumentMetadataFactoryInterface { /** * @return ArgumentMetadata[] */ public function createArgumentMetadata(string|object|array $controller, ?\ReflectionFunctionAbstract $reflector = null): array; }
